reference: Hi, I have gone through your question and understand your concerns. It is likely that you have deep damage to the muscles and possibly to the bone as well. I suggest you visit an orthopedic surgeon and have a complete thorough workup, including a physical examination and laboratory tests like X-rays and Magnetic Resonance Imaging to rule out any deep injury that could cause problems later in your life. I hope this answers your question. If you have additional or follow-up questions, then please do not hesitate to ask. I will be happy to answer your questions. Wishing you good health.
